section_name: Cooperation with United States in Law Enforcement

markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 21. Admin. of Aeronautics
##### § 21.157 — Cooperation with United States in Law Enforcement

The department shall work with agencies of the United States in enforcing the statutes, directives, rules, and regulations of the United States.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department shall work with agencies of the United States in enforcing the statutes, directives, rules, and regulations of the United States.

history.raw: Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.
